DIONYSUSANCIENT-HANGOVER_POWER.title: Hangover
DIONYSUSANCIENT-HANGOVER_POWER.descripti: Hungover creatures take damage at the end of their turn. Each turn, Hangover is reduced by [blue]1[/blue].
DIONYSUSANCIENT-HANGOVER_POWER.smartDesc: At the end of its turn, takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage, then reduce [gold]Hangover[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
